name: Cherry Cheese Cake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the graham crust ingredients. Press into an 8-inch x 12-inch loaf pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes.
3. For the filling, mix creamed cheese and powdered sugar in a bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients (dessert topping mix, milk, cherry pie filling).
5. Combine the two mixtures and pour into the cooled graham cracker crust.
6. Chill mixture for several hours until firm.
7. When set, top with one can of cherry pie filling.
